title: Principal Plant Manager at Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd!
